description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10.15.0 Docker image and three stages: test, publish, and publish_external. In the test stage add a test_icons job that runs npm install then npm i -g grunt in before_script and executes grunt test as its script. Also in the test stage add a unit_test job that runs npm install then npm i -g mocha in before_script and runs npm run test. In the publish stage add an npm_publish job that runs npm install and npx semantic-release, is manual, and only runs on the master branch. In the publish_external stage add an update:rubygem job that depends on npm_publish, runs only on master, and triggers the SUSE-UIUX/eos-icons-rails project with a dependent strategy.
